text: Apple Inc. is a technology company founded by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne. Apple's revenue in 2023 was approximately 394.3 billion USD.
The moon orbits the Earth at an average distance of about 384,400 kilometers. It takes approximately 27.3 days for the moon to orbit the Earth.
Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy. It occurs primarily in the leaves of plants.
The Great Wall of China is one of the most impressive architectural achievements in history. It stretches over 13,000 miles across northern China.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level. The freezing point of water is 0 degrees Celsius.
Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language created by Guido van Rossum. It was first released in 1991 and is known for its readable syntax.
The human heart pumps blood through the circulatory system. An average adult heart beats approximately 60 to 100 times per minute.
DNA (deoxyribonucleic acid) carries genetic instructions for all living organisms. It consists of two strands twisted together in a double helix structure.
